items.hook: Work out your exact stamp duty and ABSD before you commit, not after
items.caption: Work out your exact stamp duty and ABSD before you commit, not after. It is free to check. Head to propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 在你拍板之前，先把印花税和 ABSD 算清楚，别等签了才后悔。免费查的，就在 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

items.hook: Most people hold this property belief like it is fact, but the actual sales numbers say
items.caption: Most people hold this property belief like it is fact, but the actual sales numbers say otherwise. Pull up any home against real recent sales, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 很多人把这个房产观念当事实，但真实成交数据说的完全不一样。自己去查任何房子的近期成交记录，免费的，propsight.sg，链接在简介。

items.hook: Woodlands gives you a median 4-room resale at around $510k, a gross yield of about 6.4%,
items.caption: Woodlands gives you a median 4-room resale at around $510k, a gross yield of about 6.4%, and the kind of amenities that actually make a difference to daily life. Not bad for a mature estate if the numbers work for you. Check any town yourself, free, at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: Woodlands数据一览：四房式resale中位价约$510k，毛回报约6.4%，生活配套也算齐全。成熟组屋区，数字合得来就值得看。去propsight.sg免费查任何镇，链接在简介。

items.hook: Q2 2026 data is in: HDB resale prices fell 0.3% while private home prices added 0.5%
items.caption: Q2 2026 data is in: HDB resale prices fell 0.3% while private home prices added 0.5%. Same quarter, two very different stories depending on which market you are in. If you are pricing a HDB flat right now, the data is telling you something worth listening to. Check the latest resale transaction data free at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 2026年第二季度数据出炉：HDB转售价格下跌0.3%，私宅价格上涨0.5%。两个市场，走势截然不同。如果你正在出售HDB组屋，现在是时候重新审视你的开价了。最新成交数据免费查询，请上propsight.sg，链接在简介里。

items.hook: The job market softened in Q2 2026, and HDB resale prices and deal volumes are both feel
items.caption: The job market softened in Q2 2026, and HDB resale prices and deal volumes are both feeling it. This is not a crash, but it does mean sellers are less in control than they were 12 months ago. Buyers who come in with real transaction data have a genuine edge right now. See what flats in your target block actually sold for at propsight.sg, link in bio.
items.cap_zh: 2026年第二季就业前景走弱，HDB二手房的价格和成交量双双受压。这不是楼市崩盘，但卖方的议价优势确实不如一年前了。掌握真实成交价的买家，现在更有底气开口谈判。想查看目标楼栋的真实成交记录，欢迎访问 propsight.sg，链接在简介里。

items.hook: 5 grants first-time buyers quietly leave on the table.
items.caption: First-time buyers can stack more housing grants than most realise. Here are the ones people quietly miss. Check exactly what you qualify for, free, link in bio. Save this before you book.
items.cap_zh: 第一次买房，能拿的津贴比很多人想的多。这些是大家默默错过的。免费查你符合哪些，链接在简介。买房前先存起来。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
